concept.description: Annotates production types with SaltMarcher layer, feature, and graph-role facts.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ '(bootstrap|shell|src)\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName SET type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType, type.layer = CASE WHEN segments[0] = 'bootstrap' THEN 'BOOTSTRAP' WHEN segments[0] = 'shell' THEN 'SHELL' WHEN size(segments) >= 2 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] = 'view' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 2 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] = 'domain' THEN 'DOMAIN' WHEN size(segments) >= 2 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] = 'data' THEN 'DATA' ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.feature = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 3 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] IN ['domain', 'data'] THEN segments[2] WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] = 'view' AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN segments[3] WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[0] = 'src' AND segments[1] = 'view' AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' THEN 'slotcontent' ELSE '' END, type.graphRole = CASE WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' THEN 'APPLICATION_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.application\\..*UseCase(\\$.*)?' THEN 'USE_CASE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.model\\.service\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.model\\.policy\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_POLICY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.model\\.factory\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_FACTORY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.model\\.[^.]+\\.port\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_PORT' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.model\\.[^.]+\\.repository\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_REPOSITORY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*Binder(\\$.*)?' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*IntentHandler(\\$.*)?' THEN 'INTENT_HANDLER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ServiceContribution(\\$.*)?' THEN 'SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS LayeringType

constraint.description: Cross-layer source dependencies must stay on the documented inward-facing boundary families.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType) WHERE (source.layer = 'DOMAIN' AND target.layer IN ['BOOTSTRAP', 'SHELL', 'VIEW', 'DATA']) OR (source.layer = 'VIEW' AND target.layer = 'DATA') OR (source.layer = 'DATA' AND target.layer IN ['BOOTSTRAP', 'VIEW']) OR (source.layer = 'SHELL' AND target.layer IN ['VIEW', 'DOMAIN', 'DATA', 'BOOTSTRAP']) OR (source.layer = 'BOOTSTRAP' AND target.layer IN ['VIEW', 'DOMAIN', 'DATA']) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'documented inward layer dependencies and public boundary families only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.layer + ' -> ' + target.layer AS ActualDirection, 'Cross-layer dependencies must not bypass the documented SaltMarcher layer boundaries.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Thin orchestration roles must not form multi-role relay stacks without an intervening substantive owner.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType) WHERE source.graphRole IN ['APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'USE_CASE', 'BINDER', 'INTENT_HANDLER', 'SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION'] AND target.graphRole IN ['APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'USE_CASE', 'BINDER', 'INTENT_HANDLER', 'SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION'] AND source.graphRole <> target.graphRole RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'thin role -> substantive owner before another thin role' AS ExpectedDirection, source.graphRole + ' -> ' + target.graphRole AS ActualDirection, 'Multi-role relay chains are graph diagnostics because they hide orchestration behind another orchestration surface.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Role-bearing tactical owners must not fan out into too many foreign production owners.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType) WHERE source.graphRole IN ['APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'USE_CASE', 'DOMAIN_REPOSITORY', 'DOMAIN_PORT', 'BINDER', 'INTENT_HANDLER', 'SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION'] AND target.graphRole <> 'OTHER' AND source.fqn <> target.fqn WITH source, collect(DISTINCT target.fqn) AS targets WHERE size(targets) >= 12 RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, 'fewer than 12 distinct role-bearing production collaborators' AS ExpectedDirection, toString(size(targets)) + ' role-bearing collaborators' AS ActualDirection, 'Broad role fan-out is architecture sprawl and must be split before the role becomes a coordination hub.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Domain and data feature scopes must not build broad acyclic coupling to foreign feature scopes.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType) WHERE source.layer IN ['DOMAIN', 'DATA'] AND target.layer IN ['DOMAIN', 'DATA'] AND source.feature <> '' AND target.feature <> '' AND source.feature <> target.feature WITH source, collect(DISTINCT target.feature) AS foreignFeatures WHERE size(foreignFeatures) >= 4 RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, 'dependencies on fewer than 4 foreign domain/data feature scopes' AS ExpectedDirection, toString(size(foreignFeatures)) + ' foreign feature scopes' AS ActualDirection, 'Broad cross-feature coupling is a graph-level sprawl signal even when the dependency graph is still acyclic.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Public backend and runtime registration roots must not accumulate too broad a dependency surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringType) WHERE source.graphRole IN ['APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION'] AND source.fqn <> target.fqn WITH source, collect(DISTINCT target.fqn) AS targets WHERE size(targets) >= 18 RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, 'fewer than 18 distinct production collaborators' AS ExpectedDirection, toString(size(targets)) + ' production collaborators' AS ActualDirection, 'Broad public boundary roots become hard-to-split coordination shells and need graph-level attention.' AS Details ORDER BY Source
